concept_sheet.tech_constraints: Depop/Poshmark or Shopify, photography setup, condition grading system
concept_sheet.success_metric: 200+ items listed with 30% sell-through rate monthly

name: Fashion Show
description: Produce a fashion show event with collection staging, model casting, venue, and media coordination.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: Runway venue, 15-20 looks, backstage coordination, photographer/videographer
concept_sheet.success_metric: 200+ attendees with coverage in 5 fashion publications

name: Online Course
description: Build a comprehensive online course with video lessons, quizzes, assignments, and completion certificates.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: Teachable or Thinkific, 20-40 video lessons, quizzes, downloadable resources
concept_sheet.success_metric: 500 enrollments with 60%+ completion rate

name: Workshop Series
description: Design a multi-session workshop series with hands-on activities, facilitator guides, and participant materials.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: 4-8 sessions, 2-hour format, worksheets, Zoom or in-person, 20 max capacity
concept_sheet.success_metric: 90%+ participant satisfaction rating and 3 repeat cohorts

name: Coding Bootcamp
description: Create an intensive coding bootcamp curriculum with projects, mentorship, and job placement support.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: 12-16 week program, daily schedule, GitHub portfolio, capstone project
concept_sheet.success_metric: 80% job placement rate within 6 months of graduation

name: Corporate Training
description: Develop a corporate training program with learning objectives, assessment rubrics, and ROI measurement.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: LMS integration, SCORM compliance, pre/post assessments, manager dashboards
concept_sheet.success_metric: Measurable skill improvement in 85% of participants

name: Kids Learning App
description: Build an educational app for children with gamified lessons, progress tracking, and parental controls.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: COPPA compliance, age-appropriate UI, offline mode, parent dashboard
concept_sheet.success_metric: 50,000 downloads with 20-minute average daily session

name: Language Course
description: Design a language learning course with conversation practice, spaced repetition, and cultural context.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: Audio recording, spaced repetition algorithm, A1-B2 CEFR levels
concept_sheet.success_metric: Users reach A2 level within 90 days of daily practice

name: Certification Program
description: Build a professional certification program with exam structure, study materials, and accreditation path.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: Proctored exams, question bank of 200+, study guide, renewal requirements
concept_sheet.success_metric: 500 certified professionals and industry recognition within 2 years

name: Tutoring Platform
description: Create an online tutoring marketplace connecting students with vetted tutors and scheduling tools.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: Video chat integration, calendar booking, payment processing, tutor vetting
concept_sheet.success_metric: 500 active tutor-student matches with 4.5+ star average rating

name: Study Guide
description: Produce a comprehensive study guide with summaries, practice problems, flashcards, and exam strategies.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: PDF and web formats, 200+ practice questions, answer explanations
concept_sheet.success_metric: Students using guide score 15% higher on target exam

name: Mentorship Program
description: Design a structured mentorship program with matching criteria, milestone tracking, and feedback loops.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: Matching algorithm, monthly check-in templates, 6-month program cycle
concept_sheet.success_metric: 80% of mentees report measurable career progress

name: Conference
description: Plan a multi-day professional conference with speaker lineup, sponsorship tiers, and attendee experience.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: 500+ attendee venue, AV production, ticketing platform, mobile event app
concept_sheet.success_metric: Sell 80% of tickets and secure 90%+ speaker satisfaction

name: Music Festival
description: Organize a multi-stage music festival with artist booking, logistics, safety planning, and ticket sales.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: 3+ stages, 2-day event, permits, security, medical stations, camping
concept_sheet.success_metric: 5,000+ attendees with zero major safety incidents

name: Pop-up Experience
description: Create an immersive branded pop-up experience with interactive installations and social sharing moments.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: 2-4 week run, interactive installations, branded photo ops, timed entry
concept_sheet.success_metric: 10,000 visitors and 50,000 social media impressions

name: Hackathon
description: Organize a hackathon with challenge tracks, judging criteria, mentors, prizes, and sponsor integration.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: 24-48 hour format, Devpost submissions, API sponsors, Wi-Fi for 200+
concept_sheet.success_metric: 200 participants across 50 teams with 3 projects continuing post-event

name: Networking Event
description: Design a structured networking event with icebreakers, facilitated introductions, and follow-up system.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: 50-100 attendees, name badge system, structured 5-min rotations, CRM follow-up
concept_sheet.success_metric: Each attendee makes 10+ meaningful connections per event

name: Art Exhibition Event
description: Produce an art exhibition opening event with gallery setup, artist talks, catering, and press invitations.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: Gallery rental, lighting design, catering, PR outreach, invitation list
concept_sheet.success_metric: 200+ opening night attendees and 3 media features

name: Product Launch Event

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: Live demo setup, press kit distribution, live stream, branded venue

name: Retreat / Wellness Event

description: Design an insurance product with risk modeling, underwriting rules, claims workflow, and distribution.

name: Crowdfunding Campaign
description: Plan a rewards-based crowdfunding campaign with tiers, stretch goals, marketing timeline, and fulfillment.
